query: UPDATE bolsistas SET accessCode = CONCAT('BOLSA-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', SUBSTRING(MD5(RAND()), 1, 8)) WHERE id = 90002 AND accessCode IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45QM5TxEffSRUYR.root --database 6856TeX4yea3eYHoBQTyWM --execute UPDATE bolsistas SET accessCode = CONCAT('BOLSA-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', SUBSTRING(MD5(RAND()), 1, 8)) WHERE id = 90002 AND accessCode IS NULL;
